title: CCL - Restore defaults
scenario: Verify that after restoring device to default settings, the CCL setting reverts to "UC Noise Block" from any other selected noise block mode.
steps: Start the app on a CCL-supported device.
Select 'No Noise Block' or 'AI Noise Block'.
Restore device defaults by navigating to Device Settings > Reset Device > Restore.
Go back to Device Settings > Advanced.
Verify the CCL setting is reset to 'UC Noise Block'.
expected: The CCL setting should revert to "UC Noise Block".
